case_title: THE BEST SERVICE CO., INC. VS. DARON M. TYSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100034961) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TYSON, DARON M.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF THE BEST SERVICE CO., INC.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. DEFENDANT TYSON'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. THE SHERIFF IS TO RELEASE $42.22 TO DEFENDANT TYSON AND THE REMAINDER THAT IT IS HOLDING TO THE PLAINTIFF CREDITOR. THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TYSON TO PAY $100 PER PAY PERIOD (EVERY TWO WEEKS) COMMENCING IMMEDIATELY. COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: JACQUELINE CHAN CSR# 10276, EMAIL: JCHAN@SFTC.ORG, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-26-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF THE BEST SERVICE CO., INC.'s HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Defendant Tyson's claim of exemption is GRANTED. The sheriff is to release $42.22 to defendant Tyson and the remainder that it is holding to the plaintiff creditor. The court orders Defendant Tyson to pay $100 per pay period (every two weeks) commencing immediately.

Court to prepare order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Jacqueline Chan CSR# 10276, email: jchan@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/RBU)
